data.text: Parking will be unavailable in Lot B next Tuesday for repaving. Employees should use Lot C or the garage. Shuttle service will run every ten minutes.
choices: 火曜にB駐車場が再舗装で使用不可、C駐車場かガレージを利用、10分間隔のシャトルあり。
data.explain: Lot B + Tuesday + Lot C or garage + shuttle 10 min。

data.text: The longitudinal study found that participants who engaged in deliberate practice for at least 10,000 hours achieved expert-level performance, though critics note substantial individual variation and question the external validity of the sample.
choices: 1万時間の意図的練習で専門家レベルに達したが、個人差が大きく標本の外的妥当性に疑問。

data.text: The jury is still out on that.
data.explain: jury is still out=まだ結論が出ていない。

choices: It's too late to change now.
data.explain: ship has sailed=時すでに遅し。

data.text: She gave him the cold shoulder.
The CEO was thrown under the bus by the board.
data.q: thrown under the bus の意味は？
choices: 取締役会に裏切られ責任を押し付けられた
data.explain: throw under the bus=犠牲にする。

data.text: （新製品の売上が予想を下回った報告を受けた）建設的な質問は？
choices: What can we learn from this, and how do we adjust?

data.text: A: I don't think I'm qualified for this role.
choices: I've seen your work—you're more ready than you think.
data.explain: 具体的な根拠で自信を支える。

data.text: The study controlled for socioeconomic status, educational attainment, and baseline cognitive function, yet the effect of bilingualism on executive function remained statistically significant, albeit with a modest effect size of d = 0.3.
choices: 社会経済・教育・認知の統制後もバイリンガルの効果は有意だが効果量は控えめ(d=0.3)。
統制後に有意差は消えた。
認知は統制されなかった。

data.text: The restaurant's new farm-to-table menu features seasonal ingredients sourced within a 50-mile radius. Prices are slightly higher than before, but customer feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, with repeat visits up 25 percent.
choices: 50マイル圏内の旬の食材を使うメニューに変更。価格はやや上がったが顧客の反応は好評でリピート率25%増。
